sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88595" key="prosanata/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσανα-τάσσω</orth>, <sense id="n88595.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">draw up besides</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἑαυτά</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:1b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1b</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
